since_last: 19% of 101 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.36%; AI bubble risk 50 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 19% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.14% · BTC -1.50% · Gold -1.91% · Nasdaq100 -0.54%. 19% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.36%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.36%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -1.89%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TSLA is the standout at -7.65%
cards.body: Leaders: NOW +5.45%, PUBM +4.98%, SKHY +3.22%, INTU +1.94%, HON +1.60%. Laggards: TSLA -7.65%, GOOGL -5.07%, CEVA -3.86%, LEU -3.60%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.12% at $115.4
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.12% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
